item.title:
SportingLife: Sporting Life Racing @SportingLife · 3s Have you joined Sporting Life Plus yet?
Here are just a few reasons to, if y
item.description:
Sporting Life Racing @SportingLife · 3s Have you joined Sporting Life Plus yet?
Here are just a few reasons to, if you haven't already:
It's FREE! Access unlimited replays of all UK & Irish races Exclusive insight from Willie Mullins Track your favourite horses Early access to our expert tips

item.title: Race_iQ: RaceiQ @Race_iQ · 35s Jumping made a big difference here. Dream Shadow got a Jump Index score of 7.6 out of 10 and gaine
item.description:
RaceiQ @Race_iQ · 35s Jumping made a big difference here. Dream Shadow got a Jump Index score of 7.6 out of 10 and gained 9.06 lengths getting from A to B. White Noise got a score of 6.6 and gained only 0.53 lengths.
@FOBRacing | @haydockraces | @RacingTV Cita Racing TV @RacingTV · 2h Dream Shadow downs Cheltenham Festival winner White Noise in the Listed @UnibetRacing Abram Mares' Novices' Hurdle for @FOBRacing @haydockraces 5

item.title: sevenbarrows: Racing TV reposteó Nicky Henderson @sevenbarrows · 4min Having spoken with Michael Buckley, we’ve taken the decision not
item.description:
Racing TV reposteó Nicky Henderson @sevenbarrows · 4min Having spoken with Michael Buckley, we’ve taken the decision not to run Constitution Hill at Newbury on Saturday.
It’s very frustrating as we were keen to run, but after walking the course with George Hill this morning we felt the ground is just too quick for him — he’s a big, Mostrar más 4 11 21 860

item.title:
RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 2min "A filly with a lot of promise for the future."
John Gosden on @NewmarketRace winner So Re
item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 2min "A filly with a lot of promise for the future."
John Gosden on @NewmarketRace winner So Regal 2 267
